axioms: Axiom num_black_root_from_lt_rt : forall (v : rbtree Z) (lt : rbtree Z) (rt : rbtree Z) (h : Z), (num_black lt h /\ num_black rt h /\ rb_rch v rt /\ rb_lch v lt /\ rb_root_color v true) -> (num_black v h).
axiom_proofs: Lemma num_black_root_from_lt_rt : forall (v : rbtree Z) (lt : rbtree Z) (rt : rbtree Z) (h : Z),
(num_black lt h /\ num_black rt h /\ rb_rch v rt /\ rb_lch v lt /\ rb_root_color v true)
